compiled_state.title: [Script Tests]: PATH dir filtering removes /usr/bin tools -> ticket_create returns empty
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 1. Technical Environment

* **code_version:** fc2f7b4accda8b1ddcd3fcb0a0f4ad3d6f06fb8b
* **branch:** worktree-20260428-170727
* **ci_run:** 25089459664

### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Sub-Agent Blocker

#### Expected Behavior

test-flock-busybox-compat.sh test_ticket_create_without_flock should return a valid ticket ID when flock is excluded from PATH, confirming the mkdir lock fallback works correctly.

#### Actual Behavior

FAIL: ticket_create without any flock: returned valid id
  expected: non-empty
  actual:   empty_or_invalid:<empty>

The PATH filtering code (realpath-based exclusion) removes all PATH entries that resolve to /usr/bin (where flock lives). This also removes /usr/bin/date, /usr/bin/mktemp, and other tools needed by the ticket script. The ticket script silently exits without producing a ticket ID because the lock mechanism (which uses date for its timeout deadline) cannot function.

Second failure: test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh TIMEOUT (exceeded 90s) — also a CI failure but may be flaky. Previous CI run with same commit passed this test in 8s.

comments.body:
Investigation complete. INTERMEDIATE tier.

Root cause 1 (test-flock-busybox-compat.sh): PATH directory filtering removes /usr/bin AND /bin (Ubuntu symlink) from PATH. ticket-lib-api.sh calls sed at line 777 — first tool to exit 127 under set -euo pipefail — aborting the subshell. Script exits quickly with no output.

Root cause 2 (test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh): pre-commit is system-installed on Ubuntu 24.04 CI runners. reinstall-hooks.sh finds it and runs 'pre-commit install --hook-type <type>' 3 times. On cold CI runner, pre-commit initializes ~/.cache/pre-commit/db.db (SQLite), which stalls up to 30s per invocation x3 = 90s = test file timeout.

Fix 1: Replace PATH-directory filtering in test_ticket_create_without_flock with shadow flock binary (always exits non-zero, no util-linux output). Prepend to full original PATH. All /usr/bin tools remain accessible.

Fix 2: Add 'timeout 20' wrapper around reinstall-hooks.sh invocation in Test 7. exit 124 is accepted as valid degradation by the existing assert logic.
comments.author: Test
